title: Validation error mapping
implementation_summary: Adds the RP00.P02.M03.S13 Hermes Validation Validation error mapping surface as deterministic metadata-only control-plane policy, service prechecker, validator, fixture, README, contract definition, and contract validator wiring. The slice consumes S12 allow_metadata_only Persistence boundary results, requires the hermes_validation entrypoint, the S12 persistence boundary marker, a carried persistence receipt, audit_event_ref, persistence boundary ref, and persistence_boundary_applied marker, emits a frozen metadata-only validation error mapping receipt for the synthetic error mapping scope, records no runtime error mapping, exception translation, or error-record writes, carries S02 through S12, M00 refs, TEN-001 through TEN-008 trace refs, validation context IDs, and acceptance gate IDs, rejects unsafe validation-error-mapping, runtime, AuthZ, Hermes execution/evidence, audit write, idempotency-store write, lock-store write, persistence-store write, error-store write, database, storage, UI, tenant lifecycle mutation, requirement trace bypass, real-data, product-write, state transition bypass, persistence-boundary bypass, and review-bypass claims fail-closed, and hands off to RP00.P02.M03.S14 without completing RP00.P02.M03, appending audit ledgers, writing audit events, creating runtime routes, executing service logic, mutating tenant lifecycle state, running Hermes validation, creating Hermes evidence, evaluating runtime permissions, calling AuthZ, running a permission engine, replacing human approval, using real data, persisting idempotency records, acquiring locks, persisting lock records, writing persistence records, mapping runtime errors, translating runtime exceptions, writing error records, writing databases, writing storage, persisting product state, creating UI, or writing product state.

P3_closeout_evidence_directory_absent.reason: This closeout bundle now includes packet.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json under docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p02-m03-s13.
